title: abutilon buchii
intro: Abutilon buchii, also known as the orange flowered flowering maple, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. Abutilon buchii is valued for its health benefits, such as treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the flowers, leaves, or roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
